span.p:
T16 Create integration contract (3d)
A: SW Product

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T17 Present contract to SW team (3d)
A: SW Product

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T18 Integrate data to MEP Server (14d)
A: SW Engineering

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
T21 GATE
SW QC approval, JIRA (3d)
A: SW Engineering

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T22 GATE
Integration test approval (3d)
A: IoT Engineer

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T23 Run product final UAT (3d)
A: IoT Product Owner (R/A)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T24 GATE 5
Final UAT vs ORIGINAL L1 (3d)
A: CEO

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
T25 Define PoC plan (3d)
A: CEO

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
T26 Run PoC, min 3 sites (21d)
A: CEO

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
T27 GATE 6
PoC Go / No-Go (3d)
A: CEO
